mapper.sql: SELECT t.id, t.guild_id, t.game_partition_id, t.publisher_id, t.name, t.type, t.description, t.image, t.task_mode, t.min_players, t.max_players, t.start_time, t.join_deadline, t.end_time, t.status, t.current_players, t.version, t.created_at, t.updated_at, g.name as guild_name, u.user_name as publisher_name FROM guild_task t LEFT JOIN guild g ON t.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.publisher_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guild_task (guild_id, game_partition_id, publisher_id, name, type, description, image, task_mode, min_players, max_players, start_time, join_deadline, end_time, status, created_at) VALUES (#{guildId}, #{gamePartitionId}, #{publisherId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{description}, #{image}, #{taskMode}, #{minPlayers}, #{maxPlayers}, #{startTime}, #{joinDeadline}, #{endTime}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE guild_task SET current_players = current_players + #{delta}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
